first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is fundamentally the same. Both correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who lacks the requisite executive leadership and team-scaling experience for a CTO role. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in job locations from Western/European cities to India.
